raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Retail theft in California, including shoplifting, commercial burglary, and commercial robbery, has seen an alarming rise.",
    "Los Angeles County has the highest rate of commercial robbery in California.",
    "Commercial burglary has increased statewide and is at its highest rate since 2008.",
    "In 2022, Kern, San Francisco, and Fresno experienced the highest rates of commercial burglary.",
    "Rates of commercial burglary in Fresno, Alameda, and Orange Counties were 50 percent higher than before the pandemic.",
    "In 2023, California awarded the largest-ever single investment to combat organized retail crime, totaling over $267 million.",
    "The funding to combat organized retail crime was dispersed to 34 police departments, 7 sheriffs' departments, one probation department, and 13 district attorney offices."
  ]
}
```
